nemo._note: Only the *_streaming_* model does TRUE streaming (cache-aware). All others use ChunkedASRStream over batch ASR.

available.stt_en_fastconformer_hybrid_large_stream: TRUE STREAMING — Conformer-Transducer, ~80ms lookahead, best realtime

qwen._note: All Qwen models are batch-only — use ChunkedASRStream (streaming UX over batch ASR). 0.6B is fastest, 1.7B is most accurate.

gemini._note: Live models use bidiGenerateContent WebSocket (true streaming). Only *-live-* model IDs support this. Batch model IDs (gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-pro) use ChunkedASRStream instead.

available.gemini-2.0-flash-live-001: Live API — stable, official Live model (recommended)
available.gemini-live-2.5-flash-preview: Live API — Gemini 2.5 Flash Live preview (may require waitlist)
available.gemini-2.5-flash: Batch (chunked over REST — lower latency than pro)

google-stt._note: All models use Google's streaming_recognize gRPC (TRUE streaming, ~300ms first-word). chirp_2 is the highest-quality model widely available; chirp_3 requires allowlisting and uses location='global'.

available.chirp_2: TRUE STREAMING — Universal Speech Model 2, best quality available

whisper._note: Whisper is batch-only — uses ChunkedASRStream with a 5s interim window (Whisper rewards more context). vad_filter=false disables faster-whisper's built-in Silero VAD (no VAD anywhere in the pipeline). Pick 'base' for low latency on CPU, 'large-v3' for best accuracy. 'distil-large-v3' is the sweet-spot if you have a GPU.

available.distil-large-v3: Chunked — fast + high quality, recommended for GPU (~1.5GB)
